Test Case Name: Health check endpoint returns 201 Created
Test Steps: 1. Send GET /ping
Expected Result: HTTP 201 Created — service is up and healthy

Test Case Name: Valid credentials return a non-empty authentication token
Test Steps:
1. POST /auth with username=admin and password=password123
2. Parse the response body
Expected Result: HTTP 200; response body contains a non-empty string token

Test Case Name: Create booking returns 200 and a valid booking ID
Test Steps:
1. POST /booking with valid firstname, lastname, totalprice, depositpaid and bookingdates
2. Parse response body
Expected Result: HTTP 200; response body contains bookingid greater than 0

Test Case Name: Get booking returns the correct guest data
Preconditions: A booking with a known ID exists
Test Steps:
1. GET /booking/:id
2. Parse response body
Expected Result: HTTP 200; response body matches the exact firstname, lastname, totalprice and depositpaid used at creation; bookingdates contains checkin and checkout fields

Test Case Name: Get all bookings list contains the newly created booking ID
Preconditions: A booking with a known ID exists
Test Steps: 1. GET /booking
Expected Result: HTTP 200; response is a non-empty array; the known bookingid appears in the list

Test Case Name: Full update (PUT) returns all updated fields
Preconditions: A booking exists and a valid auth token is cached
Test Steps:
1. PUT /booking/:id with new firstname, lastname, totalprice, depositpaid=false and new bookingdates
2. Pass Cookie: token=<token> header
Expected Result: HTTP 200; response body reflects every updated field exactly

Test Case Name: Partial update (PATCH) returns only the patched fields changed
Preconditions: A booking exists and a valid auth token is cached
Test Steps:
1. PATCH /booking/:id with only firstname and totalprice
2. Pass Cookie: token=<token> header
Expected Result: HTTP 200; firstname and totalprice match patched values; lastname is unchanged and still a non-empty string

Test Case Name: Delete booking returns 201 Created
Preconditions: A booking exists and a valid auth token is cached
Test Steps:
1. DELETE /booking/:id
2. Pass Cookie: token=<token> header
Expected Result: HTTP 201 Created — booking successfully deleted

Test Case Name: Get deleted booking returns 404 Not Found
Preconditions: The booking was deleted in the previous step
Test Steps: 1. GET /booking/:id using the same ID that was deleted
Expected Result: HTTP 404 Not Found — confirms booking no longer exists

Test Case Name: GET a non-existent booking ID returns 404 Not Found
Test Steps: 1. GET /booking/999999999
Expected Result: HTTP 404 Not Found

Test Case Name: DELETE without an auth token returns 403 Forbidden
Test Steps:
1. POST /booking to create a temporary booking (record its ID)
2. DELETE /booking/:id with no token or cookie header
3. DELETE /booking/:id with a valid token to clean up
Expected Result: Step 2 returns HTTP 403 Forbidden; unauthenticated delete is rejected

Test Case Name: Create booking with missing required fields returns 500
Test Steps: 1. POST /booking with only the firstname field (all other required fields omitted)
Expected Result: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error — server cannot process an incomplete booking payload

Test Case Name: Equities search page loads with the Equities tab active and shows results
Preconditions:
Browser can reach https://www.medirect.com.mt
Cookie banner may appear on first load
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /invest/equities/search/
2. Dismiss cookie banner if shown
3. Wait for results to render
Expected Result: URL contains /invest/equities/search; at least one EQ row is visible in the results table

Test Case Name: Clicking the Funds tab navigates to the Funds section
Test Steps:
1. Click the FND Funds tab
2. Wait for page load
Expected Result: URL changes to contain the word fund

Test Case Name: Clicking the ETFs tab navigates to the ETFs section
Test Steps:
1. Click the ETF ETFs tab
2. Wait for page load
Expected Result: URL changes to contain the word etf

Test Case Name: Clicking the Bonds tab navigates to the Bonds section
Test Steps:
1. Click the BND Bonds tab
2. Wait for page load
Expected Result: URL changes to contain the word bond

Test Case Name: Searching for Apple returns at least one matching equity row
Test Steps:
1. Click the search input
2. Type Apple
3. Wait for search debounce and network idle
Expected Result: At least one EQ row is returned in the results table

Test Case Name: Clicking More Information on an equity row navigates to the security detail page
Test Steps:
1. Search for Apple
2. Click the More Information button on the APPLE INC row
3. Wait for the detail page to load
Expected Result: URL contains /stocksreports/; security detail page is loaded

Test Case Name: Searching for a non-existent equity term returns an empty results list
Test Steps:
1. Type XYZABCD1234NOTREAL into the search box
2. Wait for search debounce and network idle
Expected Result: Zero EQ rows are returned in the results table

Test Case Name: Registration banner with Become a customer CTA is visible to public users
Preconditions:
User is not logged in
Security detail page is loaded via the More Information flow
Test Steps:
1. Check if the full-functionality banner is visible
2. Check if the Become a customer link is visible inside the banner
Expected Result: Banner text Do you want to start using the full functionality for FREE? is visible; Become a customer link is visible within the banner

Test Case Name: Overview section shows all 9 financial fields locked for unauthenticated users
Preconditions: Security detail page is loaded and user is not logged in
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to the Overview section
2. Verify the Overview heading is visible
3. Check each of the 9 fields: Last Close, RoE, Mkt Cap, Dividend Yield, Exchange, PE, Volume, Net Margin, Price/Sales
Expected Result: Overview heading is visible; all 9 fields are present and each shows a lock icon indicating restricted access

Test Case Name: Bottom CTA section shows sign-up prompt to unauthenticated users
Preconditions: Security detail page is loaded and user is not logged in
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to the bottom of the page
2. Verify the Experience better Investing heading is visible
3. Verify the Become a client button is visible
4. Verify the sign-up invitation text is visible
Expected Result: Experience better Investing heading is visible; Become a client button is visible; Sign up and open your account for free within minutes text is visible

Test Case Name: Price area shows a lock icon instead of live data and back-navigation link is available
Preconditions: Security detail page is loaded and user is not logged in
Test Steps:
1. Check for the lock icon in the price and percentage area
2. Check for the Back to search results link
Expected Result: Lock icon is visible in the price area; Back to search results link pointing to /invest/equities/search/ is visible
